sys_script_include.description:
2.8.x | 2023-05-13 |raj | DFCT0011850 - With Organizational Privacy turned on > Global Templates > clear the "Primary Assignee > different private OU member are displaying "Reviewer", "Assigned Member 2.8.1 | 2022-10-17 |raj | STRY0127550 - Tech Debt - Task Types are used in code with hard coded values, modify to use a new value field in the table
2.7.1 | 2021-11-27 | raj | STRY0114396 - New function to set default Primary Assignee
2.7.0 STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates
2.5 P3 - STRY0085078 - TUP - Add Reviewer field on Template Instance - Controlled Organization Tasking Permissions v 2.5.13 - STRY0075793 - allow start template and run template modals to be called from Native pages - STRY0076609 - check the sub tasks and the current task to see if they are review item types - STRY0079327 - RUN Template UI on Platform was not working
sys_script_include.name: ClientTaskTemplateHelpers
